text: Here I am—just outside a glass-walled room, peering into a carefully crafted space dedicated to R+D. Everything feels meticulously arranged, from the safety signs to the interactive displays. I sense both anticipation and curiosity, like standing on the threshold of new ideas. The setting is modern yet slightly impersonal, and I wonder about the unseen processes and collaborations that take place in these transparent rooms. Is knowledge here an open invitation, or a puzzle to be solved?
